title: Survive

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: shadows circle in the dark (whispers echo
through the streets) hunting footsteps
after dark (no escape, no release)

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: not for what i've done they seek
my blood tonight nowhere left to run
as stars fade from sight
rise up and find me in this grace your
light bleeds through the night.
Let them come to take this place you are
my fortress you are my might (you're
all i need to survive)
in this empty room i wait for morning
light darkness closing soon but you're by my side
rise up and find me in this grace your
light bleeds through the night.
Let them come to take this place you are
my fortress you are my might (you're
all i need to survive)
(whispered/spoken) i'll sing your power
when dawn breaks through shadows of
the night let truth reveal
what darkness takes in your love i'll survive
rise up and find me in this grace your light bleeds
through the night let them come to take
this place you are my fortress you are
my might (you're all i need...) (you're
all i need...) (to survive...)

epigraph: defend me from them that rise up against me
